title: calamaria elatior
intro: Calamaria elatior is a type of plant, specifically a species of sedge, that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to Africa and Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calamaria elatior include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make tea, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
